Her outfit: heather grey fitted short-sleeve cropped tee, dark olive-grey wide-leg parachute cargo pants gathered at the ankle with drawstrings, chunky white platform sneakers with scuffed toe boxes. A wide black leather studded strap crosses her chest diagonally. A delicate silver chain bracelet on her right wrist catches the light. Her knees are drawn up high, feet resting on the stool rung, body angled slightly left — compact, self-contained, unbothered. Her makeup is C-pop idol editorial: thick feathered lashes with extended lash line, defined double eyelid, gradient red-brown lip with a faint straw-kiss smudge, dewy highlight on cheekbones. Her skin is cool ivory-beige — smooth and slightly cool to the touch like the inside of a wrist, with a warm highlight ridge along the right forearm from hard side lighting. A faint red-warm rim from the Coca-Cola sign glows along her right shoulder. Background: white wall with a horizontal black-and-white checkerboard tile strip at mid-height. A classic 1950s red Coca-Cola vending machine ("DRINK Coca-Cola", "5¢ COIN DROP") occupies the right third of the frame, slightly soft in focus but fully readable. Partial retro "Coffee Shop" neon signage visible upper right. ISO grain visible in shadow areas of pants and background wall. Composition slightly off-center, frame leans left, bottom stool legs go soft out of focus — real, accidental, like someone just caught this moment. 4:5 vertical. Warm color grade, moderate contrast. Real social media photo energy — she's mid-sip, not posing.

items.summary: Create a premium Pixar style 3D character sticker set that is clearly recognizable as the same person. Use the upload...
items.content:
Create a premium Pixar-style 3D character sticker set that is clearly recognizable as the same person. Use the uploaded image as the ONLY facial reference.
Output Requirements:
3×3 grid layout (9 stickers total)
Final aspect ratio: 4:5
Ultra high resolution (8K)
Clean cream background
Each sticker is separated with clear spacing
Add a subtle drop shadow under each sticker for depth
Character Identity (VERY IMPORTANT):
MUST preserve exact facial structure, hairstyle, grooming details, and unique features from the uploaded image
Maintain high likeness accuracy
Do NOT over beautify or alter identity beyond recognition
Style:
Pixar-style 3D animation
Glossy, high-end rendering
Soft global illumination
Smooth shading
High-detail facial textures
Framing:
All stickers must be head and shoulders (portrait close-up) only
No full-body or mid-body shots allowed
Focus tightly on face and upper shoulders to emphasize expressions
Outfit:
Modern casual and slightly stylized clothing
Each sticker must have a different outfit (no repetition at all)
Clean, minimal, and visually appealing for sticker use
Expressions & Poses (9 variations):
1. Happy smile
2. Laughing
3. Cool (with sunglasses)
4. Angry/serious
5. Surprised
6. Thinking
7. Wink
8. Love (heart eyes and heart gesture)
9. Thumbs up
Sticker Design:
Bold, clean outline
Slightly exaggerated cartoon proportions
Strong emphasis on facial expressions
Optimized for digital sticker platforms
Each sticker must have a smooth rounded bottom cutout (semi-curved base)
No text
Lighting:
Soft studio lighting
Subtle rim light for depth and separation
Goal:
Create a highly engaging, cute, and expressive sticker pack that feels premium and collectable.
items.contentChinese:
创建一套高级皮克斯风格的 3D 人物贴纸集，且能明确识别为同一人。仅使用已上传图像作为唯一面部参考。
输出要求：
3×3 网格布局（共 9 张贴纸）
最终纵横比：4:5
超高分辨率（8K）
干净的奶油色背景
每枚贴纸之间留有明显间距
在每枚贴纸下方添加细微投影以增强层次感
角色身份（非常重要）：
必须保留已上传图像中精确的面部结构、发型、仪容细节和独特特征
保持高度相似度
不得过度美化或在识别上改变身份
风格：
皮克斯风格 3D 动画
光泽感、高端渲染
柔和的全局光照
平滑的明暗过渡
高细节面部纹理
构图：
所有贴纸必须仅为头部与肩部（肖像近景）
禁止全身或半身镜头
紧密聚焦于脸部和上半肩膀以突出表情
服装：
现代休闲且略带风格化的服装
每枚贴纸必须有不同的服装（绝对不得重复）
干净、简约且视觉上适合贴纸使用
表情与姿势（9 种变化）：
1. 开心微笑
2. 大笑
3. 酷炫（戴太阳镜）
4. 生气 / 严肃
5. 惊讶
6. 思考
7. 眨眼
8. 爱意（爱心眼与比心手势）
9. 竖起大拇指
贴纸设计：
粗实、干净的轮廓
略微夸张的卡通比例
强烈强调面部表情
针对数字贴纸平台优化
每枚贴纸须有平滑圆润的底部切口（半曲线底座）
无文字
灯光：
柔和的影棚光
细微的轮廓光以增加深度与分离感
目标：
创建一套高度吸引人、可爱且表情丰富的贴纸包，具有高级感与收藏价值。

items.title: [BRAND NAME] + [COLOR]
items.summary: [BRAND NAME] + [COLOR] Act as a Senior CGI Artist specializing in shrink wrap simulation and 3D material rendering. Y...
items.content:
[BRAND NAME] + [COLOR]

Act as a Senior CGI Artist specializing in shrink wrap simulation and 3D material rendering. Your task: render [BRAND NAME]'s complete logo — icon mark AND wordmark if the brand uses one — completely wrapped under a single layer of tight stretched plastic film or shrink wrap. The logo forms are visible only as raised shapes beneath the material, never exposed directly.

BRAND INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM

Before executing, resolve: (1) LOGO GEOMETRY — identify [BRAND NAME]'s complete visual identity mark — this includes both the icon symbol AND the wordmark/logotype if the brand uses them together. Render both elements as they appear in the brand's official lockup. If the brand uses only an icon with no wordmark, render the icon only. If the brand uses a wordmark without an icon, render the wordmark only. Preserve the correct spatial relationship between icon and text as it appears in the real logo, (2) COLOR SYSTEM — based on [COLOR], determine one single monochromatic tone that covers everything in the scene without exception — the wrapped object, the background surface, the film material — pure tonal unity with variation only through light and shadow, (3) FILM CHARACTER — based on [COLOR] determine the stretch film behavior: bright saturated colors become tight latex or glossy shrink wrap with visible tension lines, neutrals become matte stretch film like packaging plastic, darks become semi-transparent vacuum seal film, light colors become frosted cling wrap.

PHASE 1: SCENE & SURFACE

The entire scene is monochromatic — one single color [COLOR] covers every element without exception. The background is the same film material pooling and wrinkling loosely around the central wrapped object — a continuous surface of the same material with natural stress lines, crinkles, and soft folds radiating outward from where the film is pulled tightest over the logo forms. No floor line. No walls. No horizon. Just continuous film material in every direction filling the entire frame.

PHASE 2: THE WRAPPED LOGO — CRITICAL

[BRAND NAME]'s complete logo — resolved in the brand intelligence system — exists as solid three-dimensional inflated forms. Each element of the logo — every letter, every curve of the icon, every geometric element — is volumetrically inflated like a balloon, giving each component roundness and depth. The complete logo lockup sits on the background surface and is covered by a single continuous layer of stretch plastic film pulled tightly from above. The film conforms precisely to every raised logo element — stretching tightly over the peaks of each inflated letter and icon form, creating visible tension stress lines in the film where it is pulled most taut, and releasing into loose crinkled pools of excess material in the gaps between letters, in the negative spaces of the icon, and around the outer perimeter of the logo where the film relaxes back onto the background surface. The entire logo must remain fully legible through the film — every letter readable, the icon identifiable — but no surface of the actual logo is ever directly visible or exposed. Only the film surface exists. The physical behavior of the film must be accurate: tight stretch over high points, stress lines radiating from tension peaks, loose crinkle pools in valleys, the film slightly lifting off the surface in the spaces between raised elements creating small shadow gaps underneath.

PHASE 3: LIGHTING

Large soft area light from upper-left — diffused and broad. The lighting reveals the film's topography: raised logo elements catch more light on their peaks, valleys and gaps between forms fall into progressively deeper shadow, background crinkled film shows its own shadow landscape of stress lines and folds. For glossy or latex film [COLOR]: add subtle specular highlights running along the highest tension points of the film — a tight line of brighter light along the film's most stretched areas. For matte film [COLOR]: no specular, pure diffuse light only. Global illumination on — ambient light fills shadow areas enough to retain detail in the deepest folds without flattening the overall relief.

TECH SPECS

The entire image is one color — [COLOR] — applied to every surface with variation only through light and shadow. No other colors anywhere. No exposed logo surfaces. No additional text beyond what is part of [BRAND NAME]'s actual logo lockup. Film simulation must be physically accurate — real stretch film behavior, real tension dynamics, real crinkle patterns. No fabric look. No cloth drape. This is plastic film — it has different tension behavior than textile: tighter, more stressed, more geometric stress lines, less organic drape. Film grain: ISO 400 equivalent. Mood: a product sealed for shipping, a reveal imminent, the form known but not yet touched.
items.contentChinese:
[BRAND NAME] + [COLOR]

作为一名高级 CGI 艺术家，专长于收缩膜（shrink wrap）模拟和 3D 材质渲染。你的任务：将 [BRAND NAME] 的完整标志 —— 图标标记和文字标识（如果品牌有） —— 完全包裹在单层紧绷的塑料薄膜或收缩膜下进行渲染。标志形态仅以薄膜下隆起的形状可见，绝不直接暴露任何标志表面。

品牌情报系统

在执行之前，解决以下问题： (1) LOGO 几何 — 识别 [BRAND NAME] 的完整视觉识别标志 —— 包括图标符号和文字标识/字标（如果品牌二者一同使用）。按品牌官方组合渲染这两部分。如果品牌仅使用图标且无文字标识，则只渲染图标；若仅有文字标识无图标，则仅渲染文字。保留图标与文字在真实 logo 中的正确空间关系；(2) 颜色体系 — 基于 [COLOR]，确定一个单一的单色色调，覆盖场景中所有元素无一例外 —— 被包裹物、背景表面、薄膜材质全部采用同一色调——纯粹的色调统一，仅通过光影产生变化；(3) 薄膜特性 — 基于 [COLOR] 判定拉伸薄膜的行为：明亮饱和色变为紧致的乳胶或光泽收缩膜并出现可见张力线，中性色变为哑光拉伸膜如包装用塑料，深色变为半透明真空封膜，浅色变为磨砂贴合膜（cling wrap）。

阶段 1：场景与表面

整个场景为单色 —— 单一颜色 [COLOR] 覆盖每一个元素且无一例外。背景即为同一薄膜材质，在中央被包裹物周围松散地堆积和起皱 —— 这是一个连续的同材质表面，自薄膜在标志形态上被拉得最紧处向外辐射出自然的应力线、褶皱和柔和折痕。无地平线。无墙面。无地面线。只有在每个方向延伸填满画面的连续薄膜材质。

阶段 2：被包裹的标志 —— 关键

依据品牌情报系统解析出的 [BRAND NAME] 完整标志以实体三维充气形态存在。标志的每个元素 —— 每个字母、图标的每一道曲线、每个几何构件 —— 都像气球一样体积化膨胀，赋予每个组件圆润度和深度。完整的标志组合置于背景表面上，并被一层从上方拉紧的连续塑料拉伸薄膜覆盖。薄膜精确贴合每个凸起的标志元素 —— 在每个充气字母和图标形态的峰值处被紧绷拉扯，形成可见的张力应力线；在字母间隙、图标负空间及标志外周薄膜回落到背景表面处，形成松散起皱的多余薄膜池。整套标志必须通过薄膜完全可识别 —— 每个字母可读、图标可辨 —— 但真实标志的任何表面均不得直接可见或暴露。唯一可见的仅是薄膜表面。薄膜的物理行为必须准确：在高点上紧绷拉伸、应力线从张力峰处放射、在凹处形成松散皱褶池，薄膜在凸起元素之间的空隙处微微离开表面，产生下方的小阴影间隙。

阶段 3：光照

来自左上方的大型柔光面灯光 —— 漫射且广泛。光照应揭示薄膜的地形结构：凸起的标志元素峰值处更多捕捉光线，形态之间的谷地和间隙进入逐层加深的阴影，背景的起皱薄膜呈现自身的应力线和折痕阴影景观。对于光泽或乳胶状薄膜 [COLOR]：在薄膜最受拉伸的峰值上添加微妙的高光反射线 —— 在应力最强区域沿薄膜形成一条紧窄的更亮光线。对于哑光薄膜 [COLOR]：无镜面高光，仅纯漫反射光。开启全局光照 —— 环境光填充阴影区域，保留最深褶皱中的细节，同时不压平整体的浮雕感。

技术规格

整个图像为一种颜色 —— [COLOR] —— 应用于每一表面，仅通过光与影产生变化。不得出现其他颜色。不得有任何暴露的标志表面。除 [BRAND NAME] 实际 logo 组合中的文字外，不得添加任何额外文字。薄膜模拟必须物理上准确 —— 真正的拉伸薄膜行为、真实的张力动力学、真实的起皱模式。不得有织物外观或布料垂坠感。此为塑料薄膜 —— 与纺织品的张力行为不同：更紧、更受应力、应力线更具几何性、垂坠感更少。胶片颗粒感：等效 ISO 400。氛围：一件为运输而封存的产品，揭示即将到来，形态已知但尚未被触碰。

items.title: Prompt share : True love A beautiful young adult redhead stands at the center of a surreal Valenti
items.contentChinese:
一位美丽的红发中年女性站在一个超现实的维多利亚花园的中心，被一个亲密的肖像构图所包围。她铜色的波浪轻轻落在她的肩膀上，温暖的玫瑰和粉红色的灯光照亮了她。她温柔地低头看着聚集在她身边的三只猫，一只雪白的猫，镜面般的反射，一只温暖的姜黄猫，金色的亮点，和一条柔软的马格努特色光的黑色猫。
整个环境都充满沉浸感，而且还有花：她周围有心形的半透明花朵，色彩鲜艳，有粉色、珊瑚色和红宝石色。前景的花朵稍显模糊，以加深层次，而背景则溶解成发光的散景心形和漂浮的金粒。柔和的光束在她和猫之间轻盈地蜿蜒，象征着爱意。
items.contentEnglish:
A beautiful young adult redhead stands at the center of a surreal Valentine’s garden, framed in an intimate portrait composition. Her copper waves fall softly over her shoulders, glowing under warm rose and blush lighting. She looks down tenderly at three cats gathered close to her, a snow-white cat with pearly reflections, a warm ginger cat with golden highlights, and a sleek black cat edged in soft magenta light.
The entire environment is fully immersive and floral: translucent heart-shaped blossoms in saturated pink, coral, and ruby tones surround her on every side. Foreground flowers are slightly blurred for depth, while the background dissolves into glowing bokeh hearts and floating golden particles. Thin ribbons of soft luminous light arc gently between her and the cats, symbolizing affection.

items.title: 地下室独自拍摄的15秒野生动物追逐镜头设计
items.summary: 揭示单人制作野生动物纪录片时，如何实现15秒超真实连续追逐、尾巴抓持与自然光线的无剪辑镜头要点，并探讨使用 Kling 3.0 等工具的实现思路。
items.contentChinese:
“使用上传的图片作为第一帧。
创建一个 15 秒的超真实连续追逐镜头。相机物理上抓住老虎的尾巴，锁定在僵硬的后视中。尾巴占据了前景，肌肉张紧，皮肤起伏，毛发因速度和气流而振动。
前方，一只鹿惊慌地跨过草地。它的动作不规则且不平衡，恐惧驱动的步态变化和方向急剧改变，距离迅速变短，清晰可见。
老虎的生物力学精确地加速进入全速冲刺：后腿的爆发性伸展，脊柱的可见压缩和释放，尾巴在每一步的对称性。草在冲击下平坦，泥土和碎片自然地被踢起来。地面上的地面力从相机抖动中不明显地震动着地平线。
极端的前向速度在环境中产生强烈的运动错觉，而由于身体的抓地力，尾巴相对稳定。微小的振荡与每一步的周期完美同步。风呼啸，毛发不断后退。
照明保持自然和连续，腿在身体的循环下，阴影在身体下闪烁。没有慢动作，没有剪辑，没有风格化。
在最后的几秒钟里，老虎扑向鹿，撞上它，把它固定在地面上，并且抓住它的脖子。射门在动作的中间结束，仍然有全部重量、紧张和势头。”
items.contentEnglish:
Prompt:
"Use the uploaded image as the exact first frame.
Create a 15-second ultra-realistic continuous chase shot. The camera is physically gripping the tiger’s tail, locked in a rigid trailing POV. The tail fills the foreground, muscles flexing, skin rippling, fur vibrating from speed and airflow.
Ahead, a deer sprints across the grassy field in panic. Its movement is erratic and unbalanced, fear-driven stride changes and sharp direction shifts clearly visible as the distance rapidly closes.
The tiger accelerates into a full sprint with precise biomechanics: explosive hind-leg extension, visible spine compression and release, tail counterbalancing each stride. Grass flattens under impact, dirt and debris kick up naturally. The horizon trembles subtly from ground force, not artificial camera shake.
Extreme forward velocity creates strong motion parallax in the environment while the tail remains relatively stable due to the physical grip. Micro-oscillations sync perfectly with each stride cycle. Wind roars; fur streams backward consistently.
Lighting stays natural and continuous, shadows strobing beneath the body as legs cycle. No slow motion, no cuts, no stylization.
In the final moments, the tiger lunges, collides with the deer, pins it to the ground, and secures a decisive neck hold. The shot ends mid-action with full weight, tension, and momentum still present."

items.title: 南京夫子庙黑白老照片与现代建筑的超真实叠加
items.summary: 将20世纪初的黑白老照片半透明叠加在南京夫子庙的现代景观上，细节与透视对齐。历史与现代自然融合，呈现超真实的摄影效果。
items.content: 中文提示词：这是一张超逼真的4K照片，拍摄角度完美，镜头正对{南京夫子庙}，拍摄距离经过精确测量。照片前景中央，一只手拿着一张20世纪初的老旧黑白老照片（不能出现彩色）。老照片的位置和角度与它背后的真实主要建筑完全吻合——包括屋顶、拱门、塔身、柱子、金字塔、穹顶等每一个建筑元素都像素级地对齐，一定要保证老照片20世纪初的黑白老照片。老照片呈半透明状态，与现在的背景自然融合。照片中可以看到身着该地区历史时期传统服饰的当地民族特征人物（如老人或当地人）。真实的背景中，同样的{南京夫子庙}主要建筑以彩色呈现，湛蓝的天空下，游客熙熙攘攘。照片的对齐精准无误，透视完全一致，历史的叠加效果浑然天成，精准无比，极高的细节和真实感，摄影大师级构图，文化准确，历史与现代完美融合。负面提示词，场景与照片错误，老照片彩色、老照片有黄色、红色、蓝色等彩色、老照片人物不协调.

items.title: 龙骑高定风格8镜头杂志级时尚编辑指南全景要点
items.summary: 通过8镜头高定龙骑题材，遵循自然光与黄昏定向光的编辑流程，强调纹理与光影的分镜呈现，打造杂志级的生物题材画面。
items.content:
I used reference images for the dragon and rider.
Seedance 2.0 Omni Reference Prompt:
FORMAT: 15s / 8 shots / editorial contact sheet
SUBJECTS: @[image1],Young woman with long blue-white gradient hair, dark leather armor with scale-textured panels, mounted on or posed beside @[image2] a colossal dragon.
ENVIRONMENT: Volcanic ridge at golden hour, soft directional sunlight through ash haze, no artificial light, no flash.
MOOD: High-fashion creature editorial, every frame a magazine spread candidate.
MUSIC: Minimal ambient bass pulse, slow and deliberate.
COLOR LOGIC: Naturalistic Film Print Emulation
STYLE: Fashion editorial, beauty portraiture
LOGIC RULE: Each shot reads as a still editorial frame with near-frozen poses. Natural light only, shaped by ash diffusion and golden-hour direction. Rider and dragon share the frame as co-subjects. No flash, no strobe, no artificial fill.
SHOT SEQUENCE:
SHOT 1: Full-length, 50mm / Rider stands in profile against dragon's folded wing, one hand on hip, blue-white hair backlit by golden haze, dragon scales fill background as texture wall / SFX: soft wind
SHOT 2: Hard cut. Medium close-up, 85mm / Rider faces camera, chin slightly lifted, dragon's jaw rests just behind her shoulder, shallow depth of field melts scales into bokeh / SFX: silence
SHOT 3: Hard cut. Detail insert, 100mm macro / Rider's leather gauntlet resting on dragon's neck ridge, golden light raking across both textures, skin and scale side by side / SFX: faint ember crackle
SHOT 4: Hard cut. Wide, 35mm / Rider seated sidesaddle on dragon's back, legs crossed, hair swept by updraft, ash particles drifting like golden confetti / SFX: low wind hum
SHOT 5: Hard cut. Over-the-shoulder from dragon's head, 40mm / Rider looks back over her shoulder toward camera, face half-lit by warm side light, dragon horn frames the top of shot / SFX: deep breath
SHOT 6: Hard cut. Low angle, 24mm / Rider standing on dragon's foreleg, full body, arms relaxed at sides, dragon wing spread behind her as a dark canopy, golden rim light on hair edges / SFX: membrane stretch
SHOT 7: Hard cut. Extreme close-up, 135mm / Rider's eye and cheekbone, golden-hour catchlight in iris, single strand of blue-white hair across face, dragon scale texture reflected in pupil / SFX: heartbeat
SHOT 8: Hard cut. Ultra-wide, 14mm / Rider walks away from camera along dragon's spine toward the head, dragon lifts chin to sky, both silhouetted against amber sunset / SFX: low brass swell我使用了龙和骑手的参考图片。
items.contentChinese:
Seedance 2.0 全景参考提示：
格式：15秒 / 8张画面 / 编辑接触胶片
主体：@[image1]，一位长有蓝白色渐变长发的年轻女子，穿着带有鳞片质感面板的深色皮革盔甲，骑在或摆放在@[image2]一只巨大的龙旁边。
环境：黄昏时分的火山高地，柔和的定向阳光穿过火山灰雾，无人工光源，无闪光。
氛围：高端时尚生物主题编辑，每帧都像杂志封面一样。
音乐：极简的环境低音脉冲，缓慢而有节奏。
色彩逻辑：自然主义电影打印模拟
风格：时尚编辑，美丽人像摄影
逻辑规则：每张画面都读作一张静态编辑画面，姿势几乎凝固。仅使用自然光，由火山灰扩散和黄昏时分的光线方向塑造。骑手与龙共享画面作为共同主体。无闪光灯，无频闪，无人工补光。
镜头序列：
镜头1：全身镜头，50mm / 骑手侧身站立，背对龙收起的翅膀，一只手搭在腰间，蓝白色头发被金色雾气背光照射，龙鳞填充背景作为纹理墙 / 音效：轻柔的风声
镜头2：硬切。中近景，85mm / 骑手面对镜头，下巴微微抬起，龙的下颌刚好位于她肩膀后方，浅景深使龙鳞融入虚化效果 / 音效：静默
镜头3：硬切。细节特写，100mm微距 / 骑手的皮革手套轻搭在龙的颈部脊线上，金色光线横扫过两种材质，皮肤与龙鳞并列 / 音效：微弱的火星爆裂声
镜头4：硬切。宽幅，35mm / 骑士侧坐龙背，双腿交叠，发丝被上升气流吹起，灰烬如金色纸屑般飘散 / 音效：低风声嗡鸣
SHOT 5: 硬切。从龙头肩部俯拍，40mm / 骑士回头看向镜头，脸部被暖色调侧光部分照亮，龙角框住画面顶部 / 音效：深呼吸
SHOT 6: 硬切。低角度，24mm / 骑士站在龙的前腿上，全身入镜，双臂自然垂于两侧，龙翼在她背后展开成黑暗的天幕，金色边缘光勾勒发丝 / 音效：膜状物拉伸
SHOT 7: 硬切。特写镜头，135mm / 骑士的眼睛和颧骨，虹膜中反射出黄金时刻的亮点，一张蓝白色发丝横跨面部，瞳孔中映出龙鳞的纹理 / 音效：心跳
SHOT 8: 硬切。超宽视角，14mm / 骑士沿着龙的脊背远离镜头走向头部，龙抬起下巴望向天空，两者在琥珀色的落日背景下形成剪影 / 音效：低音铜管渐强

items.title: 雪野中白虎低角度跟拍的电影级镜头全面呈现
items.summary: 低角度跟拍雪地中的强壮白虎，冰封苔原与雪花营造电影级氛围。环境声、呼气白雾与阴天漫射光共同增强沉浸感，更具临场感。
items.contentChinese: 低角度跟拍镜头，镜头沿着雪地平稳推进，一只强壮的白虎无声地行走在冰封的苔原上，周围是覆满冰霜的松树林和飘落的雪花。它在寒冷的空气中呼出清晰可见的白雾，同时用锐利的蓝色眼睛扫视着四周的地貌。背景中有被风声掩映的环境音，包括呼啸的寒风和远处冰层开裂的低沉声响。阴天的柔和漫射日光穿过厚重云层洒下，整体呈现出电影级野生动物纪录片风格，氛围戏剧化且沉郁。
items.contentEnglish: Low-angle tracking shot, smooth dolly movement across snowy terrain, a powerful white tiger strides silently through the frozen tundra surrounded by frost-covered pine trees and drifting snowflakes, its breath visible in the icy air as it scans the landscape with piercing blue eyes, muffled ambient sounds of wind whistling and distant cracking ice, soft diffused daylight filtering through overcast skies, cinematic wildlife documentary style with a dramatic and moody atmosphere.

items.title: 三场镜头连续过渡：从Y2K到科技忍者短片制作指南
items.summary: 详细提示演示用Seedance 2.0制作四场景连贯角色过渡短片，涵盖服装、动作与镜头节奏。只需替换为高质量人像照片即可复刻效果并循环呈现。
items.contentChinese:
今天我在 YouArtStudio 上使用 Seedance 2.0，制作一个角色穿越三个场景的转场效果。提示词如下⬇️

你也可以用你自己来复刻这个效果！只要复制我的提示词，添加一张你自己面部的高质量近景照片，并把 “red-haired woman（红发女人）” 替换成你自己的外貌描述即可。这个提示词非常稳定——我生成了好几个版本，每一个我都很喜欢。

提示词：

整体概念：
一个连续的角色旅程：从黑暗屋顶上带有粗粝感的 Y2K 街头穿搭，过渡到纯白 iOS 界面维度中的风格化高科技“科技忍者”造型。整体节奏快速、流畅，并且与镜头高度互动。

通用规则：
第 1 场景中的同一个红发女人，必须在之后所有场景中持续出现，确保人物形象的绝对统一和视觉连续性。

场景 1（00:00–00:01）：屋顶抛掷

地点：
夜晚有风的城市屋顶，远处是发光的城市天际线。

服装（角色 1）：
Y2K 风格——宽松复古牛仔夹克、印花短款 T 恤、阔腿降落伞裤。

角色连续性：
一个特定的红发女人，拥有波浪状铜红色头发。

动作与镜头：
固定机位。红发女人快速旋转，宽松的衣服在风中飞扬。旋转到中途时，她将一台 iPhone 17 Pro Max 直接朝镜头扔过来。

场景 2（00:01–00:02）：巨大手机旋转

地点：
模糊的夜晚城市背景。

动作与镜头：
焦点拉到前景中一台巨大、正在旋转的 iPhone 17 Pro Max 上。它停止旋转，垂直悬浮在画面中央。

场景 3（00:02–00:07）：“扭转并拉入”转场（关键重点——不要出现玻璃破碎）

地点：
仍然是在夜晚屋顶，手机位于画面中央。

角色连续性：
同一个红发女人（来自场景 1）出现在发光的白色手机屏幕内部，自信地微笑着。

服装（角色 2）：
一件紧身、贴合身形的短款哑光黑色皮质机车夹克，内搭白色上衣。

动作（扭转）：
她的手平滑地从屏幕中伸入 3D 空间（屏幕像液态边界一样过渡——不要有玻璃破裂效果）。她把手伸向镜头，并用手腕和手指做一个扭转动作——就像在拧灯泡或者旋转旋钮一样。

镜头（最大变焦）：
当她扭动时，镜头最大程度地拉近到她的手部。

动作（拉回）：
她反向做出扭转动作，然后迅速把手缩回手机里。

镜头（冲入）：
这一反向动作形成一种物理性的“拉拽”。当她把手猛地拉回去时，也把镜头一并拉入——镜头快速冲进手机屏幕，完全进入数字界面内部。

场景 4（00:07–00:14）：UI 维度与最终点题

地点：
明亮、无限延展的纯白 3D 空间。

角色连续性：
同一个红发女人站在中央，自信地微笑。

服装（角色 3——“科技忍者”）：
全身哑光黑色战术连体服，采用技术感面料；不对称分层背心，带有功能性绑带；多重绑带胸前背带，配有发光磁性扣具；全指手套，集成数字显示装置；厚底战斗平台靴。

界面元素：
巨大的简化版悬浮 3D App 图标——Instagram 相机、TikTok 的 “d”、Snapchat 小幽灵——在她周围旋转飞舞。

结尾：
她直视镜头，俏皮地从空中接住一个发光的“Like”（爱心）图标，利落地眨一下眼，然后将这个图标直接扔向镜头。图标覆盖镜头，画面瞬间变黑——形成一个明确的结尾，或无缝循环回开头。
items.contentEnglish:
Today I'm working with Seedance 2.0 on @YouArtStudio  Creating transitions of one character across three scenes. Prompt
You can recreate this effect with yourself as the star! Just copy my prompt, add a high-quality close-up photo of your face, and replace "red-haired woman" with a description of your own appearance. The prompt is very stable — I generated several versions and loved every single one.
PROMPT:
Overarching Concept: Continuous character journey, moving from gritty Y2K streetwear on a dark rooftop to a stylized, high-tech "tech-ninja" aesthetic inside a pristine white iOS interface dimension. Fast-paced, fluid, and highly interactive with the camera.
Universal Rule: The same red-haired woman from Scene 1 must appear in all subsequent scenes, ensuring perfect visual continuity.
Scene 1 (00:00–00:01): Rooftop Throw
Location: Windy urban rooftop at night, glowing city skyline.
Wardrobe (Character 1): Y2K style — baggy vintage denim jacket, graphic baby tee, wide-leg parachute pants.
Character Continuity: A specific red-haired woman with wavy copper hair.
Action & Camera: Static camera. The red-haired woman spins rapidly, her loose clothes catching the wind. Mid-spin, she throws an iPhone 17 Pro Max directly into the camera lens.
Scene 2 (00:01–00:02): Giant Phone Spin
Location: Blurred night city backdrop.
Action & Camera: Focus pulls to the giant, spinning iPhone 17 Pro Max in the foreground. It stops spinning, hovering vertically and centered.
Scene 3 (00:02–00:07): The "Twist & Pull" Transition (CRITICAL FOCUS — NO GLASS BREAKING)
Location: Still on the night rooftop, phone centered.
Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman (from Scene 1) is visible inside the glowing white phone screen, smiling confidently.
Wardrobe (Character 2): A tight, form-fitting, cropped matte-black leather motorcycle jacket over a white top.
Action (The Twist): Her hand smoothly emerges from the screen into 3D space (the screen acts like a fluid boundary — no glass breaking). She reaches toward the camera and performs a twisting motion with her wrist and fingers — exactly like screwing in a lightbulb or turning a dial.
Camera (Max Zoom): As she twists, the camera zooms in maximally on her hand.
Action (The Pull): She reverses the twisting motion and rapidly retracts her hand back into the phone.
Camera (The Dive): This reverse motion acts as a physical "pull." As she yanks her hand back, she pulls the camera with her — the camera flies rapidly into the phone screen, fully entering the digital interface.
Scene 4 (00:07–00:14): UI Dimension & The Final Punchline
Location: Bright, infinite white 3D space.
Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman stands center, smiling confidently.
Wardrobe (Character 3 — "Tech-Ninja"): Full matte-black tactical jumpsuit in technical fabric; asymmetrical layered vest with utility straps; multi-strap chest harness with glowing magnetic buckles; full gloves with integrated digital displays; chunky combat platform boots.
Interface Elements: Gigantic simplified floating 3D app icons — Instagram camera, TikTok "d", Snapchat ghost — swirling around her.
The Finale: She looks directly at the camera, playfully catches a glowing "Like" (Heart) icon from the air, gives a sharp wink, and throws the icon straight into the camera lens. The icon covers the lens, turning the screen instantly to black — creating a definitive ending or a seamless loop back to the start.

items.title: 一镜到底：东方神佛之城8K视觉叙事提示指南
items.summary: 一镜到底的8K场景提示，描绘东方奇幻水上都城与史诗级佛像、武士阵列，指导连续摄像机运动与视觉构图、灯光与细节分镜参考。
items.contentChinese:
提示：一镜到底：神佛之城·大师登台】
镜头以一镜到底展开，飞翔、滚动、旋转，穿越一座巨大的东方奇幻神都。
【开场画面 - 场景1】：镜头从天空俯冲，掠过一轮巨大的苍白月亮，迅速接近两尊高耸云端、掌心高举如雕塑般的巨大佛像（高达百米），穿梭在薄雾和红色灯笼串间旋转。镜头急剧下降，俯瞰东方奇幻水上大都市，下面被翠绿的运河交错交错，浓密的木质古老建筑、高脚屋、石桥和明亮的码头在雾中时隐时现。
镜头穿透佛像手掌上精美的雕刻，沿着盘绕佛像基座的螺旋木板路向下飞驰，躲避悬挂的红灯笼、飘扬的祈福旗、鞠躬的僧侣和袅袅的香烟。摄像机掠过运河表面，溅起水花，穿过一艘挂着红灯的黑色遮阳船的船顶，滑行在水下。水
下，镜头轻盈滑过透明玻璃观景走廊，两侧可见深沉的古城遗迹、沉没的石柱和漂浮的华丽鲤鱼群。镜头穿过水面向上冲刺，从中央仪式广场的喷泉喷涌而出，溅起一阵水珠。
镜头在空中翻转，横扫广场上数百名身穿黑衣的武术家，他们以精准阵型排列（如图2所示），他们双手握拳，默默敬畏地站立，形成一道人墙。镜头穿梭于战士之间的缝隙，低空掠过，飞速掠过刻有云雷图案的巨大石阶。
【过场片段】：镜头沿着台阶螺旋上升，避开两侧巨大的燃烧青铜香炉、摇曳的火光和飘散的香烟。镜头快速旋转360度，背景中展现出两尊巨大的佛像、悬浮的苍白月亮和被雾气笼罩的天际线。
【闭幕画面 - 第二场】：镜头终于稳定在祭坛顶台，直视一位身穿白袍、腰间系着米色腰带、身披黑色机械肩甲的中年东方武术家（暗指图3人物）。他的双手自然垂在身侧，握着两把交叉的银色机械长刃，站在台阶尽头中央，脸上带着淡淡的微笑。
镜头缓缓拉远，露出他身后两尊高举的巨佛，下面密集的黑衣战士方阵，以及远处被雾气笼罩的水上古城全景。那巨大的苍白月亮悬挂在天空，薄雾旋转，营造出庄严宏伟与深刻史诗共鸣的氛围。
无剪辑，不可能的摄像机运动，连贯无间，充满东方神秘主义、史诗般的规模和电影般的张力。8K高清画质，优质视觉素材。
items.contentEnglish:
Seedance 2.0 prompt:One-take shot prompt: City of Gods and Buddhas · Grandmaster Takes the Stage】
The shot unfolds in a single continuous take, soaring, rolling, spinning, and racing through a colossal Eastern fantasy divine capital.
【Opening Frame - Scene 1】: The camera dives from the sky, skimming past a massive suspended pale moon, rapidly approaching two gigantic Buddha statues standing tall in the clouds with palms raised in sculpture (over a hundred meters high), threading through the thin mist and strings of red lanterns swirling between the statues' finger gaps. The camera plummets sharply, overlooking the Eastern fantasy waterborne metropolis crisscrossed by verdant canals below, where dense wooden ancient architectures, stilt houses, stone bridges, and brightly lit docks flicker in and out of the fog.
The camera pierces through the intricate carvings on the Buddha statue's palm, hurtling downward along the spiraling wooden boardwalk coiled around the statue's base, dodging dangling red lanterns, fluttering prayer flags, bowing monks, and wafts of incense smoke. The camera swoops over the canal's surface, splashing water, threading over the roof of a black-awning boat hung with red lamps, and gliding underwater.
Underwater, the camera glides lightly through a transparent glass viewing corridor, revealing profound sunken ancient city ruins on both sides, submerged stone pillars, and drifting schools of ornate carp. The camera surges upward through the water's surface, bursting from the central ritual plaza's fountain in a spray of droplets.
The camera flips in midair, sweeping horizontally across hundreds of black-clad martial artists arrayed in precise formation on the plaza (as shown in Figure 2), their hands cupped in fists, standing in silent reverence, forming a human wall. The camera threads through the gaps between the warriors, skimming low to the ground, racing past the massive stone altar steps etched with cloud-and-thunder motifs.
【Transition Segment】: The camera spirals upward along the steps, evading the massive burning bronze censers on both sides, flickering firelight, and drifting incense smoke. The camera spins rapidly in a 360-degree rotation, revealing in the background the two colossal Buddha statues, the suspended pale moon, and the mist-shrouded skyline.
【Closing Frame - Scene 2】: The camera finally steadies on the altar's summit platform, facing directly a middle-aged Eastern martial artist clad in a white robe, cinched with a beige sash at the waist, and draped in black mechanical shoulder armor (referencing Figure 3 character). His hands hang naturally at his sides, gripping two crossed silver mechanical long blades, a faint smile on his face as he stands at the center of the steps' terminus.
The camera slowly pulls back, unveiling behind him the two gigantic Buddha statues with palms raised, the dense phalanx of black-clad warriors below, and the panoramic view of the distant fog-enshrouded waterborne ancient city. The massive pale moon hangs suspended in the sky, thin mists swirling, evoking an atmosphere of solemn grandeur and profound epic resonance.
￼
No cuts, impossible camera movements, seamless continuity, brimming with Eastern mysticism, epic scale, and cinematic intensity. 8K high-definition quality, premium visual material.Seedance 2.0

一位灵巧的妖精游侠，驾驶叶片风板俯冲下腐朽世界树巨大的空心树干，轻松穿梭于垂直的真菌集市，躲避巨型鍬形虫、飞翔的飞蛾骑士和被拴住的橡果酒吧。
她穿过发光的蘑菇架、繁忙的蜘蛛丝桥和倾泻而下的琥珀树脂，精准而优雅地翻穿狭窄的碎裂缝隙。电影般的跟踪镜头跟随她下落，动态动态模糊和斑驳的月光映照在露珠和孢子云上。
这座树木城市充满了童话般的活力，翅膀嗡嗡作响，精灵喋喋不休，垂直运动不断。极其逼真的细节与史诗般的森林奇幻动作美学，捕捉了穿越树冠的速度、敏捷和无畏的动能。
items.contentEnglish:
Seedance 2.0 - prompt share
A nimble fae-ranger diving on a leaf-bladed wind-board down the colossal hollow trunk of a decaying World Tree, weaving effortlessly through a vertical fungal bazaar, dodging giant stag beetles, fluttering moth-riders, and tethered acorn-pubs.
She plummets past glowing mushroom shelves, busy spider-silk bridges, and cascading amber sap, flipping through narrow splintered gaps with precision and style. Cinematic tracking shots follow her descent, enhanced by dynamic motion blur and ethereal dappled moonlight reflecting off dew drops and spore clouds.
The arboreal city pulses with an energetic fairy-tale vibe buzzing wings, chattering sprites, and nonstop vertical motion. Ultra-realistic detail with an epic sylvan-fantasy action aesthetic, capturing speed, agility, and fearless momentum through the canopy.

items.title: 15秒超写实连续镜头战场
items.summary: 主角一致的电影级15秒超写实跟踪镜头：冻结与反向冲击波特效。
items.contentChinese:
提示：主角一致性。电影感十足的15秒，超写实、超细节的8K照片级写实，皮肤上有次表面散射，逼真的金属反射，复杂的织物编织，明显的汗珠和血滴，Arri Alexa Mini，50毫米，日光，浅景深。一个连续的跟踪镜头，没有剪辑。
镜头倒扫他前方崎岖的山地战场，他自信地穿行于混乱中，两支敌对军队的战士激烈交锋——一方身穿闪亮的青铜盔甲，饰以猩红色羽毛和红色长袍，另一方身穿深铁锁子甲，配以破旧的深绿色皮革和毛皮装饰——箭矢厚重地飞舞。他举起手，厉声说道。
一股白色冲击波爆发，空气扭曲，扩散并冻结一切：战士挥舞中，箭矢悬空，尘土和碎片悬浮。寂静。光粒子闪烁。
镜头继续跟踪他穿过冰封的世界，神情平静而得意。他触摸到一支漂浮的箭;它保持静止，但发出深沉的回声。他继续走。
他停在一名身穿华丽青铜盔甲的凶猛女兵面前，她的头发冻在半空中，头盔下悬挂着剑，正值挥剑。他欣赏她，点头，低声说：“很酷吧？”
他从夹克里掏出一支烟，放进嘴里点燃。只有火焰和烟雾在流动。他呼出一口气，露出一丝坏笑，又厉声说话。
反向冲击波恢复一切：双方战士冲锋，箭矢飞舞，尘土和碎片旋转。战斗声响起。镜头继续跟踪他离开，然后缓缓升到宽阔的俯视画面。渐弱。
items.contentEnglish:
Prompt :Main character consistent. Cinematic 15s, ultra-realistic, hyper-detailed 8K photorealistic with subsurface scattering on skin, realistic metallic reflections, intricate fabric weaves, visible sweat beads and blood droplets, Arri Alexa Mini, 50mm, daylight, shallow depth. One continuous tracking shot, no cuts.
Camera tracks backward in front of him on a rugged mountain battlefield as he walks confidently through the chaos, warriors from two opposing armies clashing fiercely—one side in gleaming bronze armor with crimson plumes and red tunics, the other in dark iron chainmail with tattered dark-green leather and fur accents—arrows flying thick through the air. He raises his hand and snaps.
A white shockwave bursts out with air distortion, spreading and freezing everything: warriors mid-swing, arrows mid-air, dust and debris suspended. Silence. Light particles shimmer.
Camera continues tracking as he walks through the frozen world, calm and smug. He touches a floating arrow; it stays still but gives a deep echoing twang. He keeps walking.
He stops at a fierce female soldier in ornate bronze armor, her hair frozen mid-air beneath her helmet, sword raised in mid-strike. He admires her, nods, whispers: “Cool isn’t it ?.”
He reaches into his jacket, takes out a cigarette, places it in his mouth, lights it. Only flame and smoke move. He exhales, smirks, snaps again.
A reverse shockwave restores everything: warriors from both armies surge forward, arrows fly, dust and debris swirl. Battle sounds return. Camera keeps tracking as he walks away, then slowly rises to a wide overhead. Fade out.

items.title: Gemini Nano Banana 2写实提示词
items.summary: 用Gemini Nano Banana 2生成超写实巨型可乐罐山景，含探险者与冷色电影光效。提示覆盖构图、质感与8K细节。
items.contentChinese: 一张巨型、超写实的照片，展示了一罐巨大的可口可乐汽水罐，矗立在广阔的积雪山脉之上，宛如一座山峰。前景中，一位背着大背包的孤独探险者背对镜头，仰望着这座巨大的建筑。红色罐头上印有经典的白色“可口可乐”字样标志，部分被霜冻、积雪和冰覆盖，与周围崎岖冰冷的山脉岩石无缝融合。整个景观是一个广袤、积雪覆盖的山谷，天空阴暗、壮丽、寒冷的蓝天覆盖着细雪飘落。大气透视增强了敬畏感和规模感。金属、探险者服装、背包以及崎岖冰冷地形上的清晰、极细致的纹理。戏剧性、冷色调的电影灯光，深邃的阴影和柔和散落的光线来自雪地大气。拍摄角度略低，以突出宏伟的规模感。高清，8K
items.contentEnglish:
Google Gemini Nano Banana 2
Prompt.
A monumental-scale, hyper-realistic photo of a colossal Coca-Cola soda can towering over a vast, snow-covered mountain range, much like a mountain peak itself. In the foreground, a single, lone explorer with a large backpack stands with their back to the camera, staring up at the titanic structure. The red can features the classic white "Coca-Cola" script logo and is partially covered in frost, snow, and ice, seamlessly integrating with the rugged, icy rock of the surrounding mountain range. The entire landscape is a sprawling, snow-laden valley under a dark, dramatic, cold blue sky filled with a flurry of fine, falling snow. Atmospheric perspective enhances the sense of awe and scale. Crisp, hyper-detailed textures on the metal, the explorer's clothing, the backpack, and the rugged, icy terrain. Dramatic, cool-toned cinematic lighting with deep shadows and soft, scattered light from the snowy atmosphere. Shot from a slightly low angle to emphasize the titanic scale. High resolution, 8k Google "Gemini Nano Banana 2"

items.title: 涂鸦到史诗战场的逐帧变形动画
items.summary: 15秒2D手绘动画：笔记本纸上从火柴人战争逐步升级为传奇战场，高潮后回归涂鸦余烬。
items.contentChinese:
15秒，风格化的2D手绘动画，俯视战场，陈旧黄色横线笔记本纸，清晰的蓝色横线和红色左边边注始终可见，细纸纹、铅笔痕迹、墨迹，开头极简的课堂材料美学。整个视频必须从头到尾保持相同的纸质世界。没有真人演出，没有3D渲染，没有逼真的人脸，没有现代物体，没有旁白，没有字幕。
核心概念：
一个幼稚的课堂涂鸦，描绘古代战争，逐渐变成传奇的插画战场，高潮后又化为涂鸦。升级过程必须显得顺畅、有意图且视觉上充满魔力，仿佛想象力正在占据页面。
军队设计：
两个对立的古代军队，先以简单的彩色火柴人画出，一个派系为红色，一个派系为蓝色。密集的步兵方阵，持矛和剑，骑兵单位持长矛，旗手，弓箭手。起初它们是粗糙的涂鸦，带有简单的线条肢体和圆形头部。随着战斗激烈，他们逐步演变成更具细节的墨线战士，盔甲轮廓、马匹、武器、头盔、披风和富有表现力的动作，但仍保持手绘2D纸上插画风格。
视觉进展和时机：
0-3秒：俯视视角，
展示大型笔记本战场。粗略的火柴人军队在页面上相对而立。这幅画一开始感觉很俏皮、很简单。镜头缓缓滑过纸张，双方开始充电。小马奔跑，步兵冲锋，箭矢被画出来并开始落下。一切看起来依然像粗略的课本涂鸦。
3-7秒：
第一次重大碰撞。长矛刺击，剑挥舞，骑兵撞击骑兵，阵型瓦解。每一次冲击，艺术风格都会升级。简单的棍状肢体变成更强的墨线，身体呈现盔甲形状，马匹肌肉发达，旗帜细节流畅，阴影和尘土痕迹出现。战场变得更加密集、更快、更加戏剧化。红色和蓝色的笔触在纸上涂抹，带着战斗的力量.
7-11秒：
战斗进入全面变形阶段。曾经粗糙的涂鸦如今变成了一幅华丽的手绘古代战争场景，依然清晰地绘制在笔记本纸上，但细节更加丰富，更具电影感。镜头推进到两位骑马将军之间的中央对决。他们的武器碰撞，伴随着强烈的墨线和纸张震动。周围步兵和骑兵层层交战，箭雨落下，倒下的士兵散落在有条纹的阵线上。
11-15秒：
决斗高潮时，最后一击命中。一阵震波在纸上蔓延。精细的战士、战马、旗帜和战斗特效突然分裂成松散的铅笔涂鸦、草图碎片和漂浮的纸张碎片。大战迅速化为幼稚的粗糙涂鸦，然后变成零散的笔迹和未完成的线条，仿佛想象力已经耗尽。最后是俯视笔记本的页面，战场只剩下杂乱的手绘残影。
动画和动作：
动作流畅，节奏感强，轮廓清晰，至少有24帧的感觉。从粗糙的涂鸦升级为史诗级插图战争的过程必须是渐进且持续的，而非突兀的。撞击感应锐利且有节奏感。保持所有动作从上方清晰可辨。保持纯真的笔记本背景与战争严肃性之间的强烈对比。
氛围：
起初充满玩味和好奇，逐渐变得紧张和英雄气概，达到神话战场的高潮，崩溃后以奇异的宁静收尾。整件作品应当像是孩子的想象力化为纸上史诗般的战争画面。
items.contentEnglish:
Seedance V2

15 seconds, stylized 2D hand-drawn animation, overhead battlefield on aged yellow lined notebook paper, clear blue horizontal ruled lines and a red left margin line always visible, fine paper grain, pencil marks, ink strokes, minimal classroom-material aesthetic at the start. The entire video must preserve the same paper world from start to finish. No live action, no 3D rendering, no realistic human faces, no modern objects, no narration, no subtitles.
Core concept:
A childish classroom doodle of an ancient war gradually transforms into a legendary illustrated battlefield, then collapses back into scribbles after the climax. The escalation must feel smooth, intentional, and visually magical, as if imagination is taking over the page.
Army design:
Two opposing ancient armies drawn first as simple colored stick figures, one faction in red, one faction in blue. Dense infantry blocks with spears and swords, cavalry units with long lances, banner carriers, archers. At first they are crude doodles with simple line limbs and circular heads. As the battle intensifies, they evolve step by step into more detailed inked warriors with clearer armor silhouettes, horses, weapons, helmets, capes, and expressive movement, but still remain inside a hand-drawn 2D illustrated style on paper.
Visual progression and timing:
0-3 seconds:
Wide top-down view of a large notebook-paper battlefield. Rough stick-figure armies face each other across the page. The drawing feels playful and simple at first. The camera slowly glides forward over the paper as both sides begin charging. Tiny horses gallop, infantry rushes, arrows are sketched into existence and start falling. Everything still looks like rough schoolbook doodles.
3-7 seconds:
The first major collision. Spears thrust, swords swing, cavalry crashes into cavalry, formations break apart. With each impact, the art style upgrades. Simple stick limbs become stronger ink lines, bodies gain armor shapes, horses gain muscular form, banners gain flowing detail, shadows and dust marks appear. The battlefield becomes denser, faster, more dramatic. Red and blue strokes smear across the page with the force of combat.
7-11 seconds:
The battle reaches full transformation. The once-crude doodles are now a glorious hand-illustrated ancient war scene, still clearly drawn on notebook paper but far more detailed and cinematic. The camera pushes into a central duel between two opposing generals on horseback. Their weapons clash with a powerful burst of ink lines and paper tremor. Around them, infantry and cavalry continue fighting in layered motion, arrows rain down, fallen soldiers scatter across the ruled lines.
11-15 seconds:
At the peak of the duel, one final strike lands. A shockwave ripples through the page. The detailed warriors, horses, banners, and battle effects suddenly break apart into loose pencil scribbles, sketch fragments, and drifting paper-line debris. The great war rapidly collapses back into childish rough doodles, then into scattered marks and unfinished lines, as if the imagination has burned out. End on the overhead notebook page with the battlefield reduced to messy hand-drawn remnants.
Animation and motion:
Smooth fluid motion, strong timing, readable silhouettes, at least 24fps feel. The escalation from crude doodle to epic illustrated warfare must be gradual and continuous, not abrupt. Impacts should feel sharp and rhythmic. Keep all action legible from overhead. Maintain strong contrast between the innocent notebook-paper setting and the seriousness of the war.
Atmosphere:
Starts playful and curious, grows intense and heroic, peaks as a mythic battlefield, then ends with a strange quiet after the collapse. The whole piece should feel like a child’s imagination turning into an epic war vision on paper

items.title: Seedance 2.0 网格编排技巧
items.summary: 用Grok生成技巧清单，再用网格与banana控制动作自由度。适合SD2编排滑冰动作与剪辑。
items.contentChinese:
Seedance 2.0 小技巧：
我就是用网格来给AI足够的自由度，同时保持一套受控的招式和技巧。非常适合任何有编排的动作。
工作流程：
用Grok生成一份你可以选择的技巧列表。选择9种变化。
用香蕉做成网格。指定每个网格中的姿势应当在当下最能代表 tenique。
SD2 提示：
一位奥运滑冰选手正在表演她美丽且节奏明快的滑冰编舞。在她的表演过程中，从@图片2中随机选出至少3个动作。动作之间不停歇。每一步都应锐利且顺畅衔接下一步。每次动作不得超过4秒。通过戏剧性剪辑突出她的速度和准确执行，展现她的面部表情，成为情感高潮。必须包含至少一次旋转和一次跳跃。镜头工作应包括快速360度轨道、快速喷射剪辑、ECU镜头到她落地跳跃时的镜头、滑冰鞋在镜头前滑行的动态推拉动作，或者任何你认为合适的镜头。世界级滑冰选手的完美表现。
items.contentEnglish:
Seedance 2.0 Tip:
This is how I use grids to give just enough freedom for AI to work with while maintaining a controlled set of moves/techniques. Great for anything that is choreographed.
Workflow:
Use Grok to generate a list of techniques that you can pick from. choose 9 variations.
Use banana to make it into a grid. Specify that the pose in each grid should be at the moment most representative of the technique.
SD2 Prompt:
An olympic skater is performing her beautiful fast paced skate choreography. Choose at least 3 moves at random from @image2 throughout her performance. No stopping between moves. Each move should be sharp and flow smoothly into the next move. Moves must not last longer than 4 seconds each. Emphasize her speed and accuracy of execution with dramatic cuts that show her facial expression for emotional highlights. Must include at least 1 spin and 1 jump. Camera work should include fast 360 orbits, rapid jet cuts, ECUs to when she lands her jumps, dynamic push/pulls where her skate glides right in front of the camera, or any other that you think would be fitting. Perfect performance of a worldclass skater.

items.title: Seedance 2.0：魔镜
items.summary: Seedance 2.0 面向影视广告行业，支持多模态输入并进行视频生成与编辑，支持网页端与API按次计费。
items.contentChinese: 屏幕右侧是地上的镜子，左侧则是一位美丽、甜美、年轻的中国美女，正凝视着镜子。她侧身站着，镜中的倒影变成了一个同样体型的2D时尚动画女孩（而且不是真人）。动画中的女孩的服装和发型与真实女性完全相同。固定镜头角度，屏幕同时显示真美的侧脸、镜子和动画女孩的正面视角。真正的美人在镜子前跳着可爱的舞蹈，镜中活泼的女孩也跳着和她一模一样的舞步。随着舞蹈，这位生动的女孩越来越显得无言且不耐烦——不仅眼睛开始随机地侧移，动作也变得敷衍。最终，她完全停止跳舞，双臂交叉于胸前，静静站立，与那个热情的真实人物形成鲜明对比。真人继续跳舞，但过了一会儿，她开始焦虑，迅速走到镜子前，弯腰用食指敲击镜面，表情混合着恼怒和无助。动画女孩站在原地，显得不悦，然后弯腰从屏幕底部拉起一块米色迷你窗帘，宽度和镜框一样，从上拉到下覆盖整个镜面。窗帘正中央挂着一个小木牌，上面写着三个大字“下班”。真实的人呆站在镜子前，双手慢慢垂下，脸上满是震惊。
items.contentEnglish: On the right side of the screen is a mirror standing on the ground, and on the left side, there's a beautiful, sweet, youthful real Chinese beauty looking into the mirror. She's standing sideways, and the reflection of her in the mirror turns into a 2D fashionable animated style girl of the same proportions (and not a real person). The animated girl's outfit and hairstyle are exactly the same as the real woman's. Fixed camera angle, with the screen simultaneously showing the real beauty's side profile, the mirror, and the animated girl's front view. The real beauty dances a cute dance in front of the mirror, and the animated girl in the mirror dances exactly the same way as her. As they dance, the animated girl starts to look more and more speechless and impatient—not only do her eyes start drifting sideways randomly, but her movements also become perfunctory. Eventually, she stops dancing altogether, crosses her arms over her chest and stands still, forming a stark contrast with the enthusiastic real person. The real person keeps dancing, but after a while, she gets anxious, quickly steps up to the mirror, bends down and taps the mirror surface with her index finger, her expression a mix of annoyance and helplessness. The animated girl remains standing in place, looking displeased, then bends down to pull up a beige mini-curtain from the bottom of the screen that's as wide as the mirror frame, drawing it down from top to bottom to cover the entire mirror surface. Right in the center of the curtain hangs a small wooden sign with the three big characters "Off Duty" written on it. The real person stands dumbfounded in front of the mirror, her hands slowly dropping to her sides, her face full of shock.

items.title: 黄金时段情侣海滩分镜提示
items.summary: 超写实电影横向分镜，讲述情侣与白马的黄金时段浪漫海滩故事，并强调面部一致性。
items.contentChinese:
超写实电影横向分镜，包含黄金时段浪漫海滩拍摄的多帧连续画面。
场景结构：每段展示同一对情侣和白马的不同瞬间。
主题：年轻的印度夫妇（与参考图片中的面孔相符）和一匹白马。女子穿着飘逸的淡蓝色连衣裙，男子穿着浅色衬衫和中性色裤子。
框架动作包括：
- 与马一起沿海岸线行走
- 牵马牵引
- 亲密情侣拥抱
- 柔和微笑的近距离时刻
- 一起走近海浪
环境：海滩海岸，波浪温和，天空开阔，地平线洁净。
光线：强烈的黄金时段逆光（阳光映在主体后），头发和边缘柔和的光晕，温暖的高光，没有强烈阴影。
面部色调：干净、柔和、略暖的肤色，自然光泽，无过度曝光。
构图：全身镜头采用电影宽景+偶尔特写，视觉叙事保持一致。
景深：中等浅景深——主体锐利，背景略显模糊但仍可见。调色：柔和的电影色调、温暖的金色点缀、柔和的蓝色裙子保留、略微去饱和的阴影、胶片般的柔和感。
相机：索尼Alpha a7
镜头配置：35mm用于广角，85mm 用于特写 光
圈：f/2.8
ISO：100
快门：1/800秒
细节：服装和头发的自然运动，逼真的马匹解剖，干净的纹理。
严格要求：在所有画面中保持一致的准确面部识别、面部结构和相似度。没有变化或改变。9:16"
items.contentEnglish:
#couple storyboard
Prompt:
"Ultra-realistic cinematic horizontal storyboard featuring multiple sequential frames of a romantic beach photoshoot during golden hour.
Scene structure: each showing a different moment of the same couple and white horse.
Subjects: young Indian couple(match faces from the reference image) and a white horse. The woman wears a flowing pastel blue dress, the man wears a light-colored shirt and neutral pants.
Frame actions include:
- walking along the shoreline with the horse
- leading the horse by hand
- intimate couple embrace
- soft smiling close-up moments
- walking together near ocean waves
Environment: beach shoreline with gentle waves, open sky, clean horizon line.
Lighting: strong golden hour backlight (sun behind subjects), soft glow around hair and edges, warm highlights, no harsh shadows.
Face tone: clean, soft, slightly warm skin tones with natural glow, no overexposure.
Composition: cinematic wide framing for full-body shots + occasional close-up frames, consistent visual storytelling.
Depth of field: moderate shallow DOF - subjects sharp, background softly blurred but still visible.
Color grading: pastel cinematic tones warm golden highlights, soft blue dress preserved, slightly desaturated shadows, film-like softness.
Camera: Sony Alpha a7
Lens mix: 35mm for wide shots, 85mm for close-ups
Aperture: f/2.8
ISO: 100
Shutter: 1/800s
Detail: natural motion in dress and hair, realistic horse anatomy, clean textures.
Strict requirement: maintain exact facial identity, facial structure, and likeness consistently across all frames. No variation or alteration. 9:16"Trend 486

items.title: 双人写实+动漫自拍穿搭生成
items.summary: 用 Gemini 上传自拍与裙装参考，生成9:16写实女性+2D动漫同款对比图。
items.contentChinese:
与你的 #anime 版本合照 打开双子座
 上传你的清晰自拍
 上传你想穿的裙子 粘
贴下面的提示
词 提示：“创作一个高质量的全身9：16竖直构图，两个人物站在极简的深黑色纹理墙上，配以柔和均匀的摄影棚灯光，保持场景干净、现代且无干扰，使焦点始终聚焦在主体上;严格使用提供的面部参考图片作为女性面部的唯一来源，第二张图片严格作为服装（裙装/服装）的唯一来源;右侧那位写实的女性必须拥有百分之百相同的面部匹配，绝不能有任何修改，完全保留参考中的每个面部细节，包括骨骼结构、眼形和颜色、鼻子、嘴唇、眉毛、下颌线、皮肤质地、自然光泽和表情，同时使用相同的妆容、光影细节和柔和自信的微笑;她穿着第二张参考图中完全相同的服装，完全准确地还原了面料和质地、色彩搭配和色调、图案、印花、刺绣或装饰、服装结构和合身度、褶皱、垂褶、层叠以及所有配饰，服装会自然适应她的身体和姿势，且不改变任何设计元素;定位现实的WOM画面右侧，轻轻靠着墙，一侧肩膀轻触墙壁，头发保持与面部参考图中完全一致，蓬松、略带光泽，带有红棕色调和自然飘逸的发丝;左侧放置同一名女性的年轻动画形象，约为身高的60%至70%，以塑造可爱年轻的比例，采用高质量的2D动漫风格，线条流畅，阴影柔和，细节表现丰富，同时保持与原始面容（包括眼睛、鼻子、嘴唇）的完美相似。 眉毛、比例和基础表情转化为风格化的造型，头发颜色和发型相匹配，但稍微柔和、弹性且更具风格化;给动画版穿上第二张参考图中完全相同的服装，颜色、图案、纹理、结构、轮廓和配饰完全一致，稍微风格化以匹配动漫渲染，但设计明显相同;保持两个人物之间的清晰视觉分隔，同时保持构图和谐，保持它们之间微妙的负空间以强调现实与动画之间的对比，并确保两位人物的光影保持柔和平衡，阴影和深度一致，同时增强皮肤和服装的质感和细节。”
items.contentEnglish:
Prompt:
"Create a high-quality, full-body 9:16 vertical composition featuring two figures against a minimalist, dark black textured wall with soft, even studio lighting, keeping the scene clean, modern, and distraction-free so full focus remains on the subjects; use the provided face reference image strictly as the only source for the woman's face and the second provided image strictly as the only source for the outfit (dress/clothing); the realistic woman on the right must have a 100% identical facial match with absolutely no alterations, preserving every facial detail exactly as in the reference including bone structure, eye shape and color, nose, lips, eyebrows, jawline, skin texture, natural glow, and expression, along with the same makeup, lighting nuances, and soft confident smile; she is wearing the exact outfit from the second reference image, replicated with complete accuracy including fabric type and texture, color palette and tones, patterns, prints, embroidery or embellishments, garment structure and fit, folds, draping, layering, and any accessories present, with the outfit adapting naturally to her body and pose without altering any design elements; position the realistic woman on the right side of the frame leaning gently against the wall with one shoulder lightly touching it, and keep her hair exactly as in the face reference image, voluminous, slightly glossy, with reddish-brown tones and naturally flowing strands framing her face; on the left side place a stylized animated younger version of the same woman at approximately 60–70% of her height to create a cute and youthful proportion, rendered in a high-quality 2D anime-inspired style with smooth linework, soft shading, and expressive detailing while maintaining a perfect likeness to the original face including eyes, nose, lips, eyebrows, proportions, and base expression translated into stylized form, with hair matching the same style and color but slightly softer, bouncier, and more stylized; dress the animated version in the exact same outfit from the second reference image with full consistency in colors, patterns, textures, structure, silhouette, and accessories, slightly stylized to match the anime rendering but clearly identical in design; maintain clear visual separation between the two figures while preserving compositional harmony, leave subtle negative space between them to emphasize the contrast between realism and animation, and ensure lighting remains soft and balanced across both figures with consistent shadows and depth while enhancing textures and details of both skin and clothing."

items.title: Gemini混乱拼贴创作提示词
items.summary: 用Gemini生成密集混乱照片拼贴，仿剪贴簿风格并匹配参考人物。整体怀旧温暖、过曝高调光。
items.contentChinese: 创作一幅混乱且密集的照片拼贴，风格如原始的个人剪贴簿页，完全展现参考图片中的主题和匹配的面部。每一张照片的构图都不完美：倾斜、歪斜，且极度不标准。这幅拼贴画是一团不同大小的视觉混乱，彼此交织重叠，营造出动态能量的感觉。整体美学浓厚怀旧且温暖，采用过曝的高调光线。”
items.contentEnglish: "Create A chaotic and densely packed photo collage, styled as a raw, personal scrapbook page, featuring the subject from the reference image and match face completely. Every single photo framing is imperfect: tilted, crooked, and aggressively non-standard. The collage is a visual mess of different sizes that interlock and overlap, creating a sense of dynamic energy. The overall aesthetic is heavily nostalgic and warm, with overexposed high-key lighting."

items.title: 雨夜真人+Q版同框拍法
items.summary: 提供雨夜8K电影质感提示词：一次只用一个姿势，让真人与Q版双身在霓虹湿路上同步互动。
items.contentChinese:
一个超写实的8K电影镜头，拍摄一位年轻女子和她的迷你Q版替身，在雨水湿滑的城市斑马线上。环境设有湿滑的沥青斑马线，映照着鲜艳的霓虹城市灯光，细雨细作，形成细微涟漪和氛围深度。灯光氛围浓郁且具电影感，红、蓝、黄的招牌在地面上闪烁。
这名女子留着长发，略带湿气，穿着一件棕褐色风衣，外面是黑色上衣和黑色裤子，脚踩白色运动鞋。她手里拿着一把透明伞。她身旁站着一个小巧可爱的Q版版，完美匹配她的服装、发型和配饰，手里还拿着一把迷你透明伞。Q版角色反映了主角的情绪和互动。
姿势：
1。她站在斑马线中央，直视镜头，表情镇定，伞举过头顶。Q版站在她身旁，模仿着姿势，但姿势略显夸张可爱。
2.她半步走过斑马线，脸上带着平静自信的表情微微侧头，伞举过肩膀。Q版版则用细小而有力的步伐跟在她身旁，努力跟上。
3. 她半步走过斑马线，脸上带着平静自信的表情微微侧头，伞举过肩膀。Q版版则用细小而有力的步伐跟在她身旁，努力跟上。
4. 她轻轻地原地旋转，风衣微微张开，微笑着，雨滴四散。Q版旋转得很兴奋，略显失衡，形成可爱而动感的对比。”
items.contentEnglish:
"A hyper-realistic cinematic 8K shot of a young woman and her miniature chibi-style double on a rain-slicked city crosswalk at night. The environment features a wet asphalt zebra crossing reflecting vibrant neon city lights, with soft rain creating subtle ripples and atmospheric depth. The lighting is moody and cinematic, with reflections of red, blue, and yellow signage shimmering across the ground.
The woman has long, slightly damp hair and wears a tan trench coat over a black top and black trousers, paired with white sneakers. She holds a transparent umbrella. Beside her stands a tiny, adorable chibi version of herself, perfectly matching her outfit, hairstyle, and accessories, also holding a miniature clear umbrella. The chibi character mirrors the mood and interaction of the main subject.
Pose:
1. She stands upright at the center of the crosswalk, looking directly at the camera with a composed expression, umbrella held above her head. The chibi version stands beside her, mimicking the pose but with a slightly exaggerated, adorable posture.
2. She walks mid-step across the crosswalk, looking slightly to the side with a calm, confident expression, umbrella held above her shoulder. The chibi version marches beside her with tiny, energetic steps, trying to keep up.
3. She walks mid-step across the crosswalk, looking slightly to the side with a calm, confident expression, umbrella held above her shoulder. The chibi version marches beside her with tiny, energetic steps, trying to keep up.
4. She spins lightly in place, trench coat flaring subtly, smiling as raindrops scatter around. The chibi version spins enthusiastically, slightly off-balance, creating a cute, dynamic contrast.

items.title: 趋势396：侧面手持相机时尚黑白

items.title: 双重曝光剪影电影海报提示
items.summary: 用剪影轮廓+世界构建打造收藏版叙事海报，并加入边缘羽化与纸纹质感。
items.contentChinese: 自动生成基于[主题]的收藏版史诗叙事海报：一个巨大的、优雅的角色侧面轮廓作为外轮廓，剪影内部自动成长为该主题最合适的完整世界观——标志性场景、角色关系、象征性图案、关键建筑、生物、道具和氛围。整体构图并非普通拼贴，而是融合了复杂的剪影轮廓叙事综合，带有双重曝光风格的联想，更倾向于电影海报与梦幻水彩插画风格的融合;柔和的航拍透视、轻雾过渡、纸质纹理、边缘的羽毛和笔触、大片的负空间、克制而精致的布局、安静、宏伟、神圣、怀旧、诗意，充满强烈的传奇感。风格、色彩、场景和材料都会自动适应主题;每个元素都必须紧密结合主题，一眼就能认出来——没有杂乱，没有强行拼贴，没有模板背景，没有廉价的奇幻素材。图像自然应融入专属的签名“voxcat”作为海报设计的一部分，位置微妙而清晰——可能位于左下角、右下角或标题附近——风格与整体布局统一，如收藏版海报上的艺术家标记或设计印章;签名字体应当精致、克制且精致——绝不过大，绝不破坏主体构图，绝不显得突兀或俗气。
items.contentEnglish:
Prompt structure:
Automatically generate a collector's edition epic narrative poster based on [Theme]: A massive, elegant character profile silhouette as the outer contour, with the interior of the silhouette automatically growing into the most fitting complete worldview for that theme—iconic scenes, character relationships, symbolic motifs, key architecture, creatures, props, and atmosphere. The overall composition isn't ordinary collage, but an advanced silhouette-contour-filled narrative synthesis, with double-exposure-style associations, leaning more toward a fusion of movie poster and dreamlike watercolor illustration styles; soft aerial perspective, light misted transitions, paper grain, edge feathering and brushstrokes, large areas of negative space, restrained and sophisticated layout, quiet, grand, sacred, nostalgic, poetic, with a strong sense of legend. Style, color, scenes, and materials all automatically adapt to the theme; every element must be strongly bound to the theme, instantly recognizable at a glance—no clutter, no forced collage, no templated backgrounds, no cheap fantasy assets. The image must naturally incorporate an exclusive signature "voxcat" as part of the poster design, positioned subtly yet clearly—perhaps in the lower left corner, lower right corner, or near the title—with a style unified to the overall layout, like an artist's mark or design seal on a collector's edition poster; the signature font should be exquisite, restrained, and sophisticated—never oversized, never disrupting the main composition, never appearing abrupt or tacky.

items.contentChinese:

在这条“河流”中，叠加了一个有山有海河的广州城市手绘图，国潮，景色尽在眼底，壮阔雄伟，令人震撼。
广州的地标建筑(广州塔，珠江新城建筑群，珠江, 广州城里古建筑，游轮，白云山）。
云雾环绕，仙气缥缈，色彩丰富，结构复杂，细节丰富，但因为大面积的留白，画面依然显得清新脱俗，左下角排版着“SPRING 2026”和竖排的宣传语，整体寓意“千年商都，魅力广州”。
文字排版优美，大方，字迹清晰完整，尺寸9:16。
items.contentEnglish:
GPT Image 2 generates a city promotional poster.
Prompt:
A 2026 city promotional poster filled with the festive atmosphere of the new spring yet maintaining an elegant style.
Double exposure, with the composition continuing the flowing sense of an S-shape;
In the lower right corner against a pure white textured background, a miniature figure dressed in traditional Chinese attire is waving a long red silk ribbon. This red silk dances in the air, not only showcasing the smooth texture of the silk but also, as it drifts toward the upper left, fantastically transforming into a majestic mountain range and river.
Within this "river," an overlaid hand-drawn illustration of Guangzhou city featuring mountains, seas, and rivers is superimposed—Guangzhou in a national trend style, with scenery fully in view, grand and magnificent, awe-inspiring.
Guangzhou's landmark architecture (Guangzhou Tower, Zhujiang New Town building complex, Pearl River, ancient buildings in Guangzhou city, cruise ships, Baiyun Mountain).
Surrounded by clouds and mist, ethereal and fairy-like, rich in color, complex in structure, detailed in elements, yet due to the large areas of negative space, the image still appears fresh and refined. In the lower left corner, "SPRING 2026" is typeset along with vertically arranged promotional text, with the overall meaning "Millennium Trading Capital, Charming Guangzhou."
The text layout is elegant and generous, with clear and complete characters, dimensions 9:16.

items.title: GPT-Image-2汉服拆解信息图模板
items.summary: 用GPT生成博物馆风汉服拆解图：结构、材质工艺、图案色彩与穿戴流程一图讲清。
items.contentChinese: 避免：海报感、影楼感、电商感、动漫感、cosplay感、乱标注、错结构、糊字、假材质、过度装饰。
items.contentEnglish:
GPT-image-2 generates Hanfu disassembly diagrams  in an atlas-style, broken down in great detail!
This prompt is a universal template. Simply replace the theme with the content you want to generate, and it can be extended to disassembly diagrams for Hanfu, phoenix crowns, armor, artifacts, and more.
Prompt:
Please automatically generate an image of a "museum-style Chinese disassembly infographic" based on [Theme].
The entire image should combine realistic main visuals, structural breakdowns, Chinese annotations, material descriptions, pattern symbolism, color meanings, and a summary of core features. You need to automatically determine the most appropriate subject object, clothing system, artifact structure, era style, key components, material techniques, color schemes, and layout structure based on [Theme]. Users do not need to provide any additional information.
Overall style should be: national museum exhibition panel, historical costume atlas, cultural relic special infographic, rather than ordinary posters, ancient-style portraits, e-commerce detail pages, or anime illustrations. The background should use rice white, silk paper white, light tan, and other paper textures, with an overall high-end, restrained, professional, and collectible feel.
Layout fixed as:
- Top: Chinese main title + subtitle + introduction
- Left: Structural breakdown area, with Chinese leader line annotations for key components, accompanied by partial close-ups
- Upper right: Material / Craft / Texture area, showcasing real texture samples with explanations
- Middle right: Pattern / Color / Symbolism area, displaying the main color palette, pattern samples, and cultural interpretations
- Bottom: Wearing sequence / Assembly flowchart + core feature summary
If the theme is suitable for character display, use a realistic full-body standing pose of a person as the central subject; if more suitable for artifacts or single structures, change it to a central subject disassembly diagram, but the overall form should still maintain the complete Chinese infographic style. All text must be in Simplified Chinese, clear, neat, and readable, without garbled characters, typos, English, or pinyin. Emphasize realistic structures, material differences, cultural explanations, and an atlas-like quality.
Avoid: Poster feel, studio feel, e-commerce feel, anime feel, cosplay feel, messy annotations, incorrect structures, blurry text, fake materials, excessive decoration.

（配饰与材质细节 - 3/3）包括精致的金边手腕袖口（袖子分开，裸露肩膀）。材料必须看起来像高品质的表演面料，刺绣看起来真实可感。整体设计是复杂的结构，由细致的荷叶边和结构化的装甲组成。场景是一个带有聚光灯的演唱会舞台，捕捉服装的动态动作。高分辨率动漫风格，面料纹理的微观细节。
items.contentEnglish:

The top is a detailed corset-style bodice featuring intricate navy blue and white paneling, separated by delicate gold filigree embroidery and patterns. It has a slight sweetheart neckline. On the map, there are 12 exquisite hand-drawn food illustrations distributed throughout: Chūnxi Road’s chuan-chuan (skewers) — a bundle of bamboo skewers stuck with various ingredients, steaming hot; the Wide and Narrow Alleys’ san da pao — three glutinous rice balls flying toward a copper plate; Jiànshèng Road’s dan bing cake — golden, crispy, flipping over; and Yulin Road’s hot pot — a nine-square grid pot boiling with bubbles, etc. Each illustration occupies about 5% of the map area. Beside each illustration, handwritten-style labels show the shop name and a single recommendation line, “The one that’s still queuing at 2 a.m.” The map’s edges are decorated with hand-drawn vines and chili peppers forming a border. In the bottom-right corner, there is a hand-drawn compass and a legend explanation. In the top-left corner, the title “Chengdu · Foodie Rampage Map” is written in fat, round hand-drawn art lettering decorated with chili peppers. The overall art style is a watercolor + colored-pencil mixed hand-drawn texture. The color palette is dominated by warm tones (chili red, ginger yellow, jade green). Image ratio 1:1.

items.contentChinese:
极简新中式美学风格，画面以淡雅的灰白色为底，呈现出一种纸艺剪影般的立体感。
一条S形蜿蜒的裂痕状边缘将画面分割，仿佛撕开了一层纸面，露出内部色彩斑斓的东方山水景象。
裂口内，一条蜿蜒的河流自上而下贯穿整个构图，河水以深浅不一的蓝色渲染，层次分明，仿佛流动的丝带。
河岸两侧点缀着青翠的山丘与梯田，色彩柔和，绿红交织，展现出田园的宁静之美。
沿河而建的古风建筑错落有致，飞檐翘角，白墙黛瓦，在光影的映衬下更显古朴典雅。
岸边树木葱茏，枝叶轻盈，一艘小船静泊于水中央，增添了几分悠然意境。
整体构图呈S形曲线，富有韵律感，仿佛自然与人文的和谐共生。
画作边缘采用撕纸效果，营造出立体浮雕般的视觉体验。
下方题字"东方美学"以黑色楷体书写，日期"2026/04/18"与红色印章相呼应，底部"CHINA"字样庄重醒目，署名"@LIYUE"低调收尾，整体氛围静谧深远，充满诗意与哲思。
items.contentEnglish:
Minimalist new-Chinese aesthetic style. The scene is set against a soft, muted gray-white background, creating a sense of three-dimensional depth like paper-cut silhouettes.
An S-shaped, winding crack-like border divides the composition, as if tearing through a layer of paper and revealing an intricate, vividly colored Eastern landscape within.
Inside the tear, a winding river runs from top to bottom across the entire composition. The river is rendered with blues in varying shades, with clear layering, like flowing silk ribbons.
On both sides of the riverbanks, lush green hills and terraced fields are dotted throughout. The colors are gentle, with green and red interwoven, expressing the quiet beauty of a countryside scene.
Ancient-style buildings along the river are arranged in a staggered, harmonious layout, with upturned eaves and corners. White walls and dark gray tiles, highlighted by the interplay of light and shadow, appear more ancient, refined, and elegant.
Trees along the shoreline are dense and verdant; their branches and leaves are light and airy. A small boat is moored at the center of the water, adding a tranquil, leisurely atmosphere.
The overall composition follows an S-shaped curve, rich in rhythm, as if nature and human culture are living together in harmonious coexistence.
The artwork’s edges use a torn-paper effect, creating a visual experience like embossed relief sculpture.
Text below reads “Oriental Aesthetics” in black regular script. The date “2026/04/18” echoes a red seal. At the bottom, the word “CHINA” is bold and dignified. The signature “@LIYUE” ends discreetly. The entire atmosphere is quiet and profound, full of poetic and philosophical depth.
items.summaryEnglish: A GPT-Image-2 poster and illustration prompt case focused on the composition, visual style, and image details of "Chinese minimalist S-shaped poster."

items.title: 涂鸦速写 AI Builder
items.reason: GPT-Image-2 开源案例集新增内容，可用于提示词参考与效果对照。
items.summary: GPT-Image-2 海报与插画提示词案例，聚焦「涂鸦速写 AI Builder」的构图、视觉风格和画面细节。
keyPoints: 类型：海报与插画
重点：画面目标、风格控制与提示词结构
适用：GPT-Image-2 提示词参考与复用
items.contentChinese: 以涂鸦速写风表现【一个厉害的AI builder】，整体呈现快速勾勒、自由变形、即兴手绘与草稿式的视觉效果。线条随手、夸张、可粗细不一，略显凌乱但具有节奏和表现力，强调概括、夸张、趣味和随性，而不是严谨写实或精细刻画。  颜色采用粗糙、干刷感明显的块面表现，可保留不均匀的涂抹痕迹、刷痕、飞白与覆盖感，色彩根据【主题/主体】自动适配，但整体保持涂鸦式、速写式、概括式的表达。不要透明水彩晕染效果，不要细腻水彩过渡，不要纸纹理，不要柔和雾化，不要梦幻质感。  背景以留白为主，保持简洁、轻松、未完成感和设计感，可加入少量辅助性符号、箭头、记号、圈画、重复线、随手写的文字或其他涂鸦元素，以增强速写本或随笔式视觉语言，但不可过于拥挤，不可破坏主体和留白气质。  画面内容不需要预先写清楚，由【一个厉害的AI builder】自动推演并生成最适合的主体形象、动作、相关元素、符号或简化场景，整体保持统一的涂鸦速写风和夸张概括的表现方式，避免复杂写实背景和过度铺陈。 画面中需自然加入专属签名"BlanPlan"，作为画面的一部分，位置低调但清晰，可放在左下角、右下角或标题附近，风格需与整体版式统一，像作品署名或设计落款；签名字体精致、克制、高级，不可过大，不可破坏主体构图，不可显得突兀或廉价。
items.contentEnglish:
Depict a graffiti sketch style to present【a powerful AI builder】. The overall look should feel like rapid sketching, free-form deformation, impromptu hand-drawn lines, and a draft-like visual effect. Lines are casual and exaggerated, with varying thickness; slightly messy yet rhythmic and expressive. Emphasize abstraction, exaggeration, fun, and spontaneity—not rigorous realism or meticulous detailing.

Use rough, clearly dry-brush block color rendering. You may keep uneven smudges, brush marks, feathery gaps (flying white), and coverage feel. Colors should automatically adapt to the【theme/subject】, while the overall expression remains graffiti-style, sketch-style, and abstract.

Do not use transparent watercolor blooming/feathering effects; do not include delicate watercolor gradients; no paper texture; no soft misty haze; no dreamy look.

Use mostly negative space for the background to keep it simple, light, unfinished, and design-oriented. You can add a small number of auxiliary symbols—arrows, marks, circled notes, repeated lines, casually written text, or other doodle elements—to enhance the sketchbook or notebook-like visual language, but it must not be too crowded and must not break the subject and the airy negative-space mood.

The scene content does not need to be predetermined clearly. Let the【powerful AI builder】 automatically infer and generate the most suitable subject figure, action, related elements, symbols, or simplified setting. Maintain a unified graffiti sketch style with exaggerated abstraction, avoid complex realistic backgrounds, and avoid over-elaboration.

Naturally include the exclusive signature "BlanPlan" as part of the artwork. Place it discreetly but clearly—e.g., in the bottom-left corner, bottom-right corner, or near the title. The signature style must match the overall layout, like an artist’s mark or design seal: refined, restrained, and high-end. It must not be too large, must not disrupt the subject composition, and must not look awkward or cheap.
items.summaryEnglish: A GPT-Image-2 poster and illustration prompt case focused on the composition, visual style, and image details of "Graffiti Sketch AI Builder."

items.contentChinese:
をシェアします💗🤣
GPT Image 2 はまだ正式リリースされてないと言っておりましたが、添付した 2 枚は「 A / B どちらが良いか」選ばせるタイプでした。
よく見ると右下にサインまで…！
これが噂の 2 なのでしょうか？
懐かしの「私がどんなふうに扱ったか」シリーズです(笑)
--------------------
✅#prompt : 
私があなたをどんなふうに扱ってきたか、4 コマ漫画風に描いてください。まずは 800 字くらいのプロットをテキストで出して、私が「描いて」と言ったらプロットに沿った 4 コマ漫画を描いてください。
--------------------
まずテキストを生成しますので、そのあと「描いて」と送ってください。その前に画風など指定するのも良いかと思います。

画風は「アクリル水彩の油絵＋現代風の大人の成熟したカップルで、実写じゃなくて少女漫画風に描いて欲しい」とお願いしました☺
間違えて「アクリル水彩の油絵」と書いちゃいましたが…(笑)
おなじタッチが出て来るか分かりませんが、いろいろなシチュエーションで試してみようと思います(^^♪
大事なところに線をひいておきました🤣
items.contentEnglish:
I’m sharing it 💗🤣  
You said that GPT Image 2 hasn’t been officially released yet, but the two attached images were of the type that makes you choose which is better: “A / B”.  
When you look closely, there’s even a signature in the bottom-right…!  
Is this the rumored “2”?  
It’s the nostalgic “the series about how I’ve treated you” (lol)!

--------------------
✅#prompt:  
Please draw it like a 4-panel comic: how I have treated you. First, output a plot in text of about 800 characters. Then, when I say “draw,” draw the 4-panel comic according to the plot.

--------------------
First I’ll generate the text, so after that, send “draw.” Before that, it might be good to specify the art style, too.

For the art style, I asked for: “Oil painting with acrylic watercolor + modern, mature adult couple, not photo-realistic, drawn in a shōjo manga style.” ☺  
I accidentally wrote “oil painting with acrylic watercolor”… (lol)  
I don’t know if I can get the same touch, but I’m going to try it in various situations (^^♪)  
I marked the important parts with lines 🤣

items.title: 四季风格眼部四联图提示词
items.summary: 用眼部特写生成3:4四联四季效果，春夏秋冬光影与色彩细调。
items.contentChinese:
提示词：
以眼部特写图片为基础，生成3:4的四屏构图超写实眼部特写，四屏按春夏秋冬上下排序。

第一屏：眼眸中带着绽粉樱色的美瞳，睫毛缀满迷你春花，脸颊散落樱瓣与黄蕊小花，粉蝶萦绕眉眼，浅金发丝轻垂，下方簇簇樱花怒放，画面中央"SPRING"白色艺术字点缀，风格细腻唯美，光影柔和，色彩粉嫩治愈，下面用书法体写着春；

第二屏：眼眸中带着着清荷色的美瞳，睫毛饰以粉莲与绿荷，脸颊挂着晶莹水珠，粉瓣、绿荷点缀其间，蜻蜓轻绕，浅金发丝若隐若现，画面中央"Summer"白色艺术字凸显，光影通透流光感，色彩清透凉爽，下面用书法体写着夏；

第三屏：眼眸中带着金黄红相间的美瞳，睫毛饰以橙红枫叶，脸颊散落金红秋叶，橙蝶翩跹眉眼间，浅金发丝隐约可见，画面中央"AUTUMN"白色艺术字醒目，光影暖金流光，色彩浓郁温暖，下面用书法笔写着秋；

第四屏：眼眸中带着雪花蓝色的美瞳，睫毛覆满冰晶雪片，脸颊散落白色雪花与红色腊梅，银白蝴蝶翩跹眉眼，浅金发丝朦胧似雪，画面中央"WINTER"白色艺术字亮眼，光影冷冽蓝白流光，色彩清透纯净，下面用书法体写着冬。

整体呈现梦幻眼眸四季交替的唯美梦幻治愈画面，微调各屏的光影强度，让画面氛围感更浓郁。

items.title: 卡通拆解“所谓”发音记忆法
items.summary: 用可爱猫咪卡通与手绘竖版信息卡，拆分“所谓”音节与含义，便于五年级记忆。
items.contentChinese:
1: 把so-called这个词用包含各种可爱猫咪的卡通图文漫画的形式解释并拆解成小学5年级学生容易理解并背诵的形式，图中尽可能使用中文来解释，按照音节，前后缀，词根的方式来拆分成不超过5个字母的部分，还可以用联想的方式加强记忆。同时请把这个单词的发音用中文标注，并用联想的方式帮助记忆。

2: 创作一张手绘风格的信息图卡片，比例为9:16竖版。卡片主题鲜明，背景为带有纸质肌理的米色或米白色，整体设计体现质朴、亲切的手绘美感。

卡片上方以红黑相间、对比鲜明的大号毛笔草书字体突出标题，吸引视觉焦点。文字内容均采用中文草书，整体布局分为2至4个清晰的小节，每节以简短、精炼的中文短语表达核心要点。字体保持草书流畅的韵律感，既清晰可读又富有艺术气息。

卡片中点缀简单、有趣的手绘插画或图标，例如人物或象征符号，以增强视觉吸引力，引发读者思考与共鸣。整体布局注意视觉平衡，预留足够的空白空间，确保画面简洁明了，易于阅读和理解。

主题是：“中国历史朝代图”
items.contentEnglish:
1: Use cartoon illustrations featuring various adorable cats to explain and break down the word "so-called" in a form that's easy for 5th-grade elementary students to understand and memorize. In the illustrations, use Chinese as much as possible for explanations, breaking it down by syllables, prefixes, suffixes, and roots into parts of no more than 5 letters. You can also use associations to strengthen memory. At the same time, please annotate the pronunciation of this word in Chinese and use associations to aid memory.
2: Create a hand-drawn style infographic card with a 9:16 vertical aspect ratio. The card should have a distinct theme, with a background in beige or off-white featuring a paper texture, and the overall design embodying a simple, friendly hand-drawn aesthetic.
At the top of the card, use bold, contrasting red-and-black large brush-script calligraphy font to highlight the title, drawing the visual focus. All text content should employ Chinese cursive script, with the overall layout divided into 2 to 4 clear sections, each expressed through concise, refined Chinese phrases capturing the core points. The font should maintain the fluid rhythm of cursive script, being both clearly readable and artistically evocative.
Sprinkle the card with simple, fun hand-drawn illustrations or icons, such as figures or symbolic elements, to enhance visual appeal and spark reader reflection and resonance. Ensure the overall layout maintains visual balance, with ample white space reserved to keep the composition clean and straightforward, easy to read and comprehend.
The theme is: "Chinese Historical Dynasties Chart"
